homeInfo.title: Audio Quality Evaluation
homeInfo.message:
Welcome to this audio quality evaluation test.

You will listen to 11 audio samples and answer 2 questions about each one.
Please use headphones and ensure you are in a quiet environment.

For each question, rate the audio on a scale from 1 (very poor) to 7 (excellent).

Click the button below when you are ready to begin.

questions.name: Sample 0
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
solo acoustic nylon string guitar playing in a fingerstyle Brazilian bossa nova style.

prompts.0: How correct is the information in the caption with relation to the audio? Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, incorrect information) to 7 (best, accurate information)
prompts.1: How complete is the caption with relation to the audio. Consider mood, genre, and instrumentation descriptions. Rate on a scale from 1 (worst, does not contain information) to 7 (best, contains all relevant musical information)

questions.name: Sample 1
questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This instrumental track blends psychedelic, funk, and retro rock elements into a groovy, energetic fusion. Featuring electric guitar, bass, and drums with varied sound effects, the medium-tempo arrangement creates an atmosphere suitable for retro movie scenes or live performances.

It features a simple yet effective drum beat accompanied by a groovy piano melody that creates a relaxed atmosphere suitable for a coffee shop or casual gathering. The overall sound remains easygoing throughout, making it an ideal choice for background music in social settings.

The overall vibe creates an atmosphere perfect for a stylish lounge or trendy bar setting.

The overall sound is simple yet effective, emphasizing the bluesy feel of the guitar work without additional instrumentation.

questions.description:
Listen to the audio sample below and answer both questions.

CAPTION
This instrumental track from the video game Dragon Engine features a fast tempo and heavy drumming that creates an intense, driving rhythm. The music blends electric guitar with aggressive metal elements to establish a powerful atmosphere suitable for high-stakes action scenes like combat or boss battles. Overall, the composition delivers an energetic mood defined by its loud, forceful sound and repetitive beat.
